About This Project
Built for CASCO Automotive Tunisia (Amphenol Group), this project involved cleaning 5 years of production quality data spread across 159 Excel batch files from 3 ZIP archives. The pipeline handles missing values, duplicate removal, fuzzy string matching for defect name normalization, machine ID standardization, and date format unification. Result: a fully clean, structured dataset loaded into SQL Server and ready for Power BI and ML modeling.
Tools & Technologies
Python + Pandas
Core cleaning logic — null handling, deduplication, type casting
RapidFuzz
Fuzzy string matching to normalize 844 defect name variants
SQL Server
Final storage with M-XXX machine ID schema and unified taxonomy
SSIS ETL
Automated data flow from raw Excel sources to SQL staging tables
